text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After a race, I actually catch sight of Doto! In the
flesh! She's been slow to improve recently, so I
get a glimpse of her looking down...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I recognize the issue as her not having entered
her "race-ready" state yet, but apparently she
herself isn't aware...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My trainer pushes me to share my knowledge, but
I know I won't ever stop yapping if I get started!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My worst fears come true as I end up imposing on
my oshi and rambling on at Mach two speed!
There's no way this conversation is going to be
useful to her!
